meta.label: Board Game
meta.name: Happy Salmon
meta.short_description: High five, fist bump, switch places and have fun together. Be the fastest to win.

boardgamehonor.name: 2016 Golden Geek Best Party Game Nominee
2016/Spring Parents' Choice Fun Stuff Award Winner
2019 Palme de Bronze for Best Party Game

alternatenames.name: ハッピーサーモン 日本語版 グリーン
ハッピーサーモン 日本語版 ブルー

meta.description:
Happy Salmon is a simple, ultra-fast, very silly card game.

There are no turns. Players call out the action shown on their cards as fast as they can. When two players have a match, they celebrate by performing the action. Actions include the classic "High 5", the unifying "Pound It", the frantic "Switcheroo", and the delightful and bizarre "Happy Salmon".

Each time a player celebrates a match, they quickly discard a card. The first person to get rid of all their cards wins.
meta.wiki:
72 cards (12 cards for 6 colours each), 1 Rulebook, Happy Salmon Pouch

CONTENTS:
72 cards (12 in each player color - green, blue, plum, purple, dark orange, orange; 50x88mm)
Rules sheet
Salmon zippered travel pouch.
